# Get Supplies: 9 Different Indoor Cannabis Grow Setups & Yield Estimates
by Nebula Haze
You pick the last nug from your stash and put it into your grinder.  _Out again?_ It feels like you’re always running out of weed at the worst time. And the prices at the local weed dispensary are out of control.  _You know what? It’s time to grow my own cannabis_. It’s decided. But what do you need? How do you start growing marijuana indoors so it’s easy and productive? Find out in today’s cannabis growing supplies tutorial!
Quick Overview: How to Grow Weed Indoors
  1. **Get Supplies <– today’s tutorial**
  2. [Germination](https://www.growweedeasy.com/germinate) (sprout seeds)
  3. [Grow the Plant](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-vegetative-stage) (vegetative stage)
  4. [Grow the Buds](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-flowering-stage) (flowering stage)
  5. [Harvest & Dry Buds](https://www.growweedeasy.com/ready-for-harvest-pictures)

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-long-does-it-take-to-grow-weed)
## What Supplies Do I Need to Grow Weed Indoors?
These are the basic supplies you need to grow cannabis indoors
  * **Light** – Without the sun you need a grow light (light is food for plants)
  * **Environment** – Cannabis plants are smelly and need their beauty sleep, so plants do best in a protected environment like a grow tent (pictured below). You can also modify a grow space like the inside of a closet.
  * **Home for Roots** – Grow medium like soil, coco, or hydro
  * **Nutrients** – Nutrients are in soil, and many growers add nutrients to water

Cheap grow tents keep dust/hair off your weed, block light from getting in or out, and help control heat and smells. The perfect home for an indoor cannabis plant!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/06/grow-tent-hps-flowering-tent-and-led-vegetative-tent-Manzfoo.jpg)
Now that you understand the basics, here are a few different examples of great indoor cannabis grow setups.
### 2’x2′ Grow Tent – Small
  * **Ultra short edition – 3′ tall**
    * 65W – [HLG 65 LED Grow Light](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-High-Efficiency-Upgraded/dp/B076QDKVDZ?crid=3JOCN0G689TT6&keywords=HLG%2B65%2BLED%2BGrow%2BLight&qid=1705080188&sprefix=%2Caps%2C130&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.006c50ae-5d4c-4777-9bc0-4513d670b6bc&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=57b06cf97728d1216606ed6b3a0aad0a&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 1-3 oz per harvest
    * [$300 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
  * **Room to grow – 4′ tall**
    * 100W – [SF-1000 LED Grow Light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-Dimmable-MeanWell-Spectrum/dp/B07TS82HWB?crid=2SG3VQR061G81&keywords=SF-1000%2BLED%2BGrow%2BLight&qid=1705080215&sprefix=sf-1000%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Caps%2C162&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=52cb108f11b585f648e5efe72b75b39d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 2-4 oz per harvest
    * [$430 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)

Example of a 2’x2′ grow tent
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/mini-tent-hlg-100-led-grow-light.jpg)
### 2’x4′ Grow Tent – Medium
  * **Standard Power – 5′ tall**
    * 200W – [SF-2000 LED grow light](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-SF2000-Dimmable-Hydroponics/dp/B07TVD1Y3K?crid=341DPAS9E0JD3&keywords=sf-2000+led+grow+light&qid=1705080245&sprefix=SF-2000+LED+grow+light%2Caps%2C177&sr=8-8&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a51f3dc376fd46f585629f426a44c19d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 5-11 oz per harvest
    * [$555 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
  * **Max Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300W – [Mars Hydro SP3000 LED](https://www.amazon.com/Coverage-Spectrum-MeanWell-Dimmable-Commercial/dp/B08FQRR9RB?crid=3QDU8TJK30CZ3&keywords=mars%2Bhydro&qid=1701198191&sprefix=mars%2Bhydro%2B%2Caps%2C132&sr=8-10&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=e25d55bff7c87c28cc2ad68b748c7bd5&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 7-13 oz per harvest
    * [$575 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-sp3000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial-300w-led)
  * **Over Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300-400W range (dimmable) – for growers who go crazy with power
    * Up to 16 oz per harvest
    * [$495 to get started with a 400W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$745 to get started with 315 LEC](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$890 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-350r-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial) with [HLG 350R](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-Quantum-Certified/dp/B08KYNTRWN?crid=2VSNMWTIDAGMA&keywords=HLG+350R+LED+grow+light&qid=1705080285&sprefix=hlg+350r+led+grow+light%2Caps%2C167&sr=8-5&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.2b70bf2b-6730-4ccf-ab97-eb60747b8daf&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=595a1d8760f7879a528ef66e177d42c4&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (Massively overpowered LED)

Example of a 2’x4′ grow tent (about the size of a standard closet)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/2x4x5-grow-tent.jpg)
Here’s my current grow inside one of these right now. I think this is the perfect size for most home growers because it can yield many ounces up to a pound per harvest depending on the grow light you use.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/week-6-flowering-defoliation-tent-hlg-300-r-spec-on.jpg)
### 3’x3′ Grow Tent (Square shape is better in some spaces)
  * **Standard Power – 6′ tall**
    * 300W – [Mars Hydro FC-E3000](https://www.amazon.com/MARS-HYDRO-FC-E3000-Light-Dimmable/dp/B08Q35VJQL?keywords=mars+hydro&qid=1671034841&sr=8-3-spons&psc=1&smid=AKPEMWWZ95494&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUEyVkJNMVVST0hKU0ZaJmVuY3J5cHRlZElkPUEwMTc3NTc4WkwxQ0dTWExGUkVQJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTA2OTk3NDFVOFdHUFAyRlIxUE4md2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGYmYWN0aW9uPWNsaWNrUmVkaXJlY3QmZG9Ob3RMb2dDbGljaz10cnVl&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a90dd2086fd09563bcf63977c3570e37&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 7-13 oz per harvest
    * [$475 to get started with FC-E3000](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mars-hydro-fc-e3000-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
  * **Max Power (cold grow room) – 6′ tall**
    * 315 LEC or 400W HPS (dimmable)
    * 7-16 oz per harvest
    * [$745 to get started with 315 LEC](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
    * [$495 to get started with a 400W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)

Example of a single hydro plant growing in a 3’x3′ grow tent with a 400W HPS. You could fit more plants if you use pots instead of hydro.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/white-rhino-before-harvest-250w-hps.jpg)
###  4’x4′ Grow Tent – Large
  * **1 lb LED Producer – 6.5′ tall**
    * [HLG Blackbird LED grow light](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B09QV4M21P?th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=84941503a807ef5163880ce6a139dea2&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
    * 10-22 oz per harvest
    * [$1595 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-blackbird-600w-premium-led-cannabis-grow-setup-shopping-list-up-to-1-5-lb-yield)
  * **1 lb HPS Producer 6.5′ tall**
    * [600W HPS](https://www.amazon.com/iPower-Digital-Dimmable-System-Reflector/dp/B00E5O82XE?crid=3V2TZKRAQKRI2&keywords=600w%2Bhps%2Bkit&qid=1705081840&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=600w%2Bhps%2Bkit%2Clawngarden%2C119&sr=1-6&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.f5122f16-c3e8-4386-bf32-63e904010ad0&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=9febaa390c1b01946947b34e0645557c&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (dimmable)
    * 10-21 oz per harvest
    * [$495 to get started](https://www.growweedeasy.com/600w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)

Example of a 4’x4′ grow tent (easily yield a pound)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/electric-sky-led-grow-light.jpg)
Now that you’ve got an overview, let’s look at each of the cannabis grow kits a little closer.
## Small Setups
These are the smallest grow setups on this list, but they can still grow a significant amount of weed!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/small-plants-mini-tent-hlg-65-led-grow-light-under-window-sm.jpg)
### Ultra short edition – 3′ tall
  * HLG 65 LED Grow Light (65W)
  * 1-3 oz per harvest
  * 2’x2’x3′ grow tent

**Setup cost: $300** ($420-500 with professional smell filtering)
[Click here to get the full shopping list for this 65W LED cannabis grow setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
Example of a plant grown in [this mini cannabis grow kit setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-for-300-in-this-mini-grow-kit-up-to-3-oz-harvest-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/mini-tent-pineapple-chunk-hlg-65-led-grow-light-sm.jpg)
3 oz harvest (85g is ~3 oz)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/pineapple-chunk-hlg-65-led-grow-light-harvest-85-grams.jpg)
### Room to grow – SF-1000 LED Grow Light
  * 2-3 oz per harvest
  * 2’x2’x4′ grow tent
  * Setup cost:

[Click here to get the full shopping list for this 100W LED setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial)
[This setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial) uses a slightly bigger grow light and gives you more height in case a plant gets taller than expected
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/spider-farmer-sf-1000-mini-grow-tent-flowering-cannabis-sm.jpg)
It’s tall enough we were able to squeeze a little hydroponic system in there.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/hydro-dwc-mini-tent-sm.jpg)
I once grew [autoflowering](https://www.growweedeasy.com/whats-the-highest-yielding-autoflowering-strain) plants that got way too tall because they took longer than expected to start flowering. However, the light is gentle enough that it won’t burn buds even if they’re close, as long as you make sure to give your plants proper nutrients. The SF-1000 makes this a perfect grow light for a beginner because it will forgive you if you make some mistakes.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/cannabis-plants-grew-too-close-sf-1000-but-still-looked-good.jpg)
## Medium Setups
These medium cannabis growing setups involve 2’x4′ grow tents. Here’s a picture to give you an idea of the size difference of one of these closet-sized grow tents compared to the mini tent.
Example of a mini tent next to a tall 2’x4’x6′ grow tent
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/big-and-little-grow-tents.jpg)
### Standard – SF-2000 LED grow light
  * 2’x4’x5′ grow tent
  * 5-11 oz per harvest

This is a bigger version of the same Spider Farmer light that is made for a 2’x4′ grow space instead of a 2’x2′. It has all the same pluses as the SF-1000. Stays cool, grows happy healthy plants, and produces great yields for only a little electricity. I’ve found that plants tend to be more resistant to nutrient deficiencies and other grow problems under this particular LED model compared to many other LEDs.
[Click here to get the full shopping list for the SF-2000 LED setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
These cannabis plants were grown from clone to harvest under the [Spider Farmer SF-2000 LED grow light kit](https://www.growweedeasy.com/200w-led-spider-farmer-sf-2000-cannabis-setup-shopping-list-grow-tutorial)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/spider-farmer-sf-2000-led-grow-light-28-days-flowering.jpg)
Those marijuana plants at harvest (10 oz yield). [Check out the grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/led-grow-journal-mars-hydro-tsl-2000w-vs-spider-farmer-sf-2000).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/spider-farmer-led-grow-tent-with-flash-harvest-sm.jpg)
### Max power – HLG 350W LED grow light
  * 2’x4’x6′ grow tent
  * 7-13 oz per harvest

[Click here to get the full shopping list for the HLG 350W setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-350r-led-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
_Alternative for a cold grow space:_ If your grow space rarely gets warm, a better alternative to an LED grow light for this size tent is a [400W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial). It doesn’t just put off more heat, plants under HPS tend to be more cold-resistant than LED plants (which tend to be sensitive to cold).
[Check out my grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/super-soil-vs-coco-coir-side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal) where I grew with two examples of a similar cannabis grow kit in a side-by-side experiment with super soil vs coco. The buds really thicken under an excellent LED grow light!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/electric-sky-es300-led-grow-light-flowering-stage.jpg)
### Over Power – 315W LEC or 400W HPS (dimmable)
  * 2’x4’x6′ grow tent
  * 7-16 oz per harvest
  * These get hot!

[Here’s the shopping list for the 315 LEC setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/315w-lec-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[Here’s the shopping list for the 400W HPS setup ](https://www.growweedeasy.com/400w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
_They are almost exactly the same setup with a different light, but I made a separate page for each one so I could give hints and tips for each one on how to get the best results with cannabis._
If you are willing to deal with heat, the 315W LEC or 400W HPS can produce an incredible harvest in a 2’x4′ grow tent. However, any “big bulb” grow lights like these will raise the temperature of the room by several degrees compared to LEDs, which is typically too much heat for the average grower. However, if you’re willing to [vent the heat out a window](https://www.growweedeasy.com/exhaust#how-to-create-stealthy-exhaust-system) or use an AC (air conditioner), you’ll be rewarded with the biggest harvests possible in this size grow space.
Example of a 315W LEC in action. This grow [produced 1 pound of weed](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-cannabis-315-lec-grow-light) in a single harvest!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/grow-tent-with-315-lec-grow-light.jpg)
## Large Setups
These two setups will produce the most weed of any setup on this list. Most cannabis home growers will get the best results using LEDs. However, LED plants thrive in warm temperatures and grow poorly in the cold. So if your grow space tends to get cold (for example during winter), you may want to choose the HPS option. HPS grow lights put off more heat per watt than LEDs and HPS plants tend to be less sensitive to cold.
### LED Producer – HLG Blackbird LED grow light
  * 4’x4’x7′ grow tent
  * 10-22 oz per harvest
  * Best choice if heat is a concern

[Click here to get the full shopping list for the HLG Blackbird LED setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hlg-blackbird-600w-premium-led-cannabis-grow-setup-shopping-list-up-to-1-5-lb-yield)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/04/flowering-plants-in-4x4-grow-tent.jpg)
### HPS Producer – 600W HPS (dimmable)
  * 4’x4’x7′ grow tent
  * 10-21 oz per harvest
  * Best choice if grow space tends to get cold

[Click here to get the full shopping list for the 600W HPS cannabis setup](https://www.growweedeasy.com/600w-hps-cannabis-grow-setup-tutorial)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/sour-diesel-critical-kush-under-600w-HPS.jpg)
[](https://www.instagram.com/growweedeasy/)

  * Oh no! How can we improve?

Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
